bluetooth.label: Bluetooth Connectivity
bluetooth.description: USB-C + Bluetooth dual connectivity. Requires Bluetooth Consortium licensing ($12k).
bluetooth.notes: Cannot advertise until licensing fee paid

custom-profiles.notes: Coming soon — waiting on app development

primary.benefit: Frames the product as unlocking new capability

alternatives.benefit: Problem-first framing — speaks to RSI and input overload

alternatives.text: Engage the Agility of Your Feet.
Two More Limbs. Zero More Pain.
alternatives.benefit: Solution-forward, balances gain and pain relief
Benefit-first, speaks directly to RSI sufferers

alternatives.text: Your Feet Were Always in the Game.

alternatives.benefit: Double meaning — more input methods + more access to gaming

primary.text: The world's first analog dual foot controller for PC gaming and VR. 16 additional actions. Zero extra fingers required.

alternatives.text: 36% of pro gamers suffer wrist pain. GLYDR redistributes the load — 16 analog actions, zero extra strain.
alternatives.benefit: Stat-driven RSI messaging from esports research

alternatives.text: Your hands are overloaded. Your feet are untapped. GLYDR bridges the gap with analog precision.

primary.text: Engage the agility of your feet.

alternatives.benefit: Bold, challenges assumptions about gaming input

alternatives.text: Retire the strain. Not the player.
alternatives.benefit: References pro player retirements from RSI

alternatives.text: The input your rivals can't see.
alternatives.benefit: Stealth advantage framing for competitive gamers
Action-oriented, Halo callback for FPS audience

primary.text: Fully configurable analog foot controller for video games and virtual reality. Assembled in Texas.
primary.benefit: Core product descriptor with origin pride

alternatives.text: 16 analog actions under your desk. Built for competitive gamers, VR users, and anyone who needs their hands back.
The accessibility-first foot controller that gives every body a competitive edge. USB-C wired. Assembled in Texas.

alternatives.benefit: Brand name in CTA with price

ticker.text: Because Wrist Braces Aren't a Gaming Peripheral
Your Career Shouldn't End at Your Wrists
ticker.benefit: Speaks to esports pros and serious gamers

_instructions.tagline_statuses: production = live on site | staging = approved, ready to deploy | test = being evaluated | development = concept/draft
_instructions.themes: pain-point, health, empowerment, accessibility, competitive, community, product, direct — group related taglines for campaign planning
_instructions.archive: Deleted taglines move here with timestamp. Can be restored from the Archive tab in admin.
_instructions.how_to_schedule_feature: Set activateDate to an ISO date string and change status to 'scheduled'.
_instructions.how_to_activate_now: Set activateDate to today's date or earlier and status to 'active'.
_instructions.feature_statuses: active = live now | scheduled = has future date | planned = no date yet | blocked = cannot activate
